queries.question: List all navigation systems and also display communication systems used at Heathrow Airport.
queries.sql:
SELECT Navigation_Systems.TypeOfSystem
FROM Navigation_Systems
UNION
SELECT Communication_Systems.TypeOfSystem
FROM Communication_Systems
WHERE Communication_Systems.Airport = "Heathrow"

queries.question: Can you show navigation and communication systems used at Heathrow Airport?
queries.sql:
SELECT Navigation_Systems.TypeOfSystem
FROM Navigation_Systems
WHERE Navigation_Systems.Airport = "Heathrow"
UNION
SELECT Communication_Systems.TypeOfSystem
FROM Communication_Systems
WHERE Communication_Systems.Airport = "Heathrow"

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display navigation systems and communication systems used at Heathrow Airport.
